languages.original_text: "The rank of Genetor grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

languages.text: "Сан {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} наделяет меня правом изучать их гнусную анатомию и повадки с целью поиска уязвимостей. Я лично препарировал не один образец и даже сохранил определенные части с целью дальнейшего изучения. С теми же целями я веду поиск и изучение их технологий. Орудия врагов не зазорно применять против них самих, что бы ни говорили некоторые узколобые коллеги!"

traits.locale_text: "Сан {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} экстремис наделяет меня правом изучать их гнусную анатомию и повадки с целью поиска уязвимостей. Я лично препарировал не один образец и даже сохранил определенные части с целью воспроизведения их свойств в некоторых имплантах. С теми же целями я веду поиск и изучение их технологий. Орудия врагов не зазорно применять против них самих, что бы не говорили некоторые узколобые коллеги!"

languages.text: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

languages.text: «El rango de {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} me otorga el derecho de estudiar su pérfida anatomía y su espantoso comportamiento con el propósito de identificar sus debilidades. He diseccionado personalmente a más de un espécimen e incluso he preservado partes específicas para investigarlas en profundidad. Estudio y analizo su tecnología con este mismo objetivo. ¡Está más que justificado utilizar las armas del enemigo en su contra, independientemente de lo que opinen nuestros colegas más cerrados de mente!».
languages.original_text: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

traits.locale_text: «El rango de {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} me otorga el derecho de estudiar su pérfida anatomía y su espantoso comportamiento con el propósito de identificar sus debilidades. He diseccionado personalmente a más de un espécimen e incluso he preservado partes específicas para investigarlas en profundidad. Estudio y analizo su tecnología con este mismo objetivo. ¡Está más que justificado utilizar las armas del enemigo en su contra, independientemente de lo que opinen nuestros colegas más cerrados de mente!».

languages.text: “{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}的头衔，使我有权研究这些肮脏生物的解剖结构和行为模式，以便找出它们的弱点。我亲手解剖过不止一个样本，甚至保存了特定的身体部位以供进一步研究。我研究和学习它们的技术也是为了同样的目的。用敌人的武器对付敌人并不丢人，不用理会那些心胸狭隘之人的说辞！”
languages.original_text: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

traits.locale_text: “{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}的头衔，使我有权研究这些肮脏生物的解剖结构和行为模式，以便找出它们的弱点。我亲手解剖过不止一个样本，甚至保存了特定的身体部位以供进一步研究。我研究和学习它们的技术也是为了同样的目的。用敌人的武器对付敌人并不丢人，不用理会那些心胸狭隘之人的说辞！”

languages.text: « En tant que {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g}, je suis autorisé à étudier leur anatomie révoltante et leur comportement infâme dans le but d'identifier leurs points faibles. J'ai personnellement disséqué plus d'un spécimen, et même préservé certains membres et organes pour une étude approfondie. J'étudie et j'analyse leur technologie à cette même fin. Il n'y a aucune honte à retourner les armes de nos ennemis contre eux, quoi qu'en disent certains collègues à l'esprit étriqué ! »
languages.original_text: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

traits.locale_text: « En tant que {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g}, je suis autorisé à étudier leur anatomie révoltante et leur comportement infâme dans le but d'identifier leurs points faibles. J'ai personnellement disséqué plus d'un spécimen, et même préservé certains membres et organes pour une étude approfondie. J'étudie et j'analyse leur technologie à cette même fin. Il n'y a aucune honte à retourner les armes de nos ennemis contre eux, quoi qu'en disent certains collègues à l'esprit étriqué ! »

languages.text: "Der Rang des {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} gibt mir das Recht, ihre verderbte Anatomie und ihr Verhalten zu studieren, um ihre Schwächen zu identifizieren. Ich habe persönlich zahlreiche Exemplare seziert und einzelne Körperteile konserviert, um sie eingehender zu untersuchen. Ich erforsche und studiere ihre Technologie gleichermaßen. Es ist keine Schande, die Waffen unserer Feinde gegen sie einzusetzen, egal, was einige engstirnige Kollegen sagen!"
languages.original_text: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Rang des {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} gibt mir das Recht, ihre verderbte Anatomie und ihr Verhalten zu studieren, um ihre Schwächen zu identifizieren. Ich habe persönlich zahlreiche Exemplare seziert und einzelne Körperteile konserviert, um sie eingehender zu untersuchen. Ich erforsche und studiere ihre Technologie gleichermaßen. Es ist keine Schande, die Waffen unserer Feinde gegen sie einzusetzen, egal, was einige engstirnige Kollegen sagen!"

languages.text: "ジェネター・エクストレミス "の階級は、彼らの弱点を特定する目的で、彼らの汚い解剖学と行動を研究する権利を私に与えている。私は個人的に複数の標本を解剖し、特定のインプラントにその特性を再現するために、特定の体の部位を保存したこともある。私は同じ目的で、彼らのテクノロジーを研究・調査している。敵の武器を敵に利用することは、一部の偏狭な同僚が何と言おうと、恥ずべきことではない！"
languages.original_text: "The rank of Genetor Extremis grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts in order to replicate their properties in certain implants. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} mevkisi, zayıflıklarını tespit etmek amacıyla onların iğrenç anatomilerini ve davranışlarını inceleme hakkını bana sunuyor. Bizzat birden fazla numuneyi parçalarına ayırdım, hatta ayrıntılı inceleme için belirli vücut parçalarını dahi muhafaza ettim. Teknolojilerini de aynı amaçla araştırıyor ve inceliyorum. Bazı dar görüşlü meslektaşlarım istediğini desin, düşmanlarımızın silahlarını onlara karşı kullanmanın utanılacak bir yanı yoktur!"
languages.original_text: "The rank of {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} grants me the right to study their foul anatomy and behaviour for the purposes of identifying their weaknesses. I have personally dissected more than one specimen and have even preserved specific body parts for further investigation. I research and study their technology to the same end. There is no shame in using our enemies' weapons against them, no matter what some narrow-minded colleagues may say!"

Bizzat birden fazla numuneyi parçalarına ayırdım, hatta ayrıntılı inceleme için belirli vücut parçalarını dahi muhafaza ettim. Teknolojilerini de aynı amaçla araştırıyor ve inceliyorum.
